blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,374 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
